_doc: Vampire discipline 'spells'. Each entry sets requires_vampire=true so non-vampires never see them in get_available_spells. requires_skill points to the discipline name (dominate/auspex/celerity/potence/obfuscate); skill_required encodes VtM dot levels (1, 3, 5). requires_clan limits a power to clans that traditionally hold the discipline; empty array means any kindred who has trained the skill can use it.

command.name: Command
command.description: A single barked word lodges in the target's mind, bending them to your will for a brief moment. The classic Dominate parlor trick.

mesmerize.name: Mesmerize
mesmerize.description: Your gaze locks the target's mind. Their will becomes yours, and even those born to resist mortal charm cannot turn away.

dominate.name: Dominate
dominate.description: Total mastery. The target becomes a puppet of your will, controllable through `order` until your blood runs out or you release them.

heightened_senses.name: Heightened Senses
heightened_senses.description: Auspex sharpens your perception. The unseen reveals itself.

aura_perception.name: Aura Perception
aura_perception.description: You read the target's aura — humanity, clan, recent emotions all visible to your inner eye.

telepathy.name: Telepathy
telepathy.description: You hear the surface thoughts of any mind nearby — secrets surface, lies fall flat.

quickness.name: Quickness
quickness.description: Celerity grants the kindred a moment of preternatural speed. The world slows.

swift_strike.name: Swift Strike
swift_strike.description: Multiple blows land in the time mortals take to throw one. A favored Brujah finisher.

vigor.name: Vigor
vigor.description: Potence floods your limbs with inhuman strength.

mighty_blow.name: Mighty Blow
mighty_blow.description: A single strike of impossible force — bones shatter, walls crack.

cloak_of_shadows.name: Cloak of Shadows
cloak_of_shadows.description: Obfuscate cradles you in dimness. In the dark, no one sees you. Step into light and the cloak fails.

unseen_presence.name: Unseen Presence
unseen_presence.description: True invisibility — even broad daylight cannot betray your position to mortal eyes.
